nasb.text: the young lady would go in to the king in this way: anything that she desired was given her to take with her from the harem to the king’s palace.

esv.text: when the young woman went in to the king in this way, she was given whatever she desired to take with her from the harem to the king’s palace.

cnv.text: 那時，少女進去見王是這樣的：從女院到王宮的時候，她所要的都要給她。

ccb.text: 每个女子从女宫到王宫晋见王时，她所要求的一切都要给她。
